description: Style NoteRevel in the luxurious feel of soft fabric with this pair of basics hip brief that combines comfort and style. The double layered pouch ensures enhanced support while the cut offers easy leg movementProduct DetailsGrey hip brief that has a broad elasticated and printed waistband, double layered pouch and brand tag on the inside of the waisbandMaterial and Care95% cotton and 5% elastaneMachine wash with cold waterUse a non chlorine bleachTumble dry lowDo not dry clean or ironFitRegular fit
